infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SurveySnap Pro uses your camera to capture high-quality survey photographs.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SurveySnap Pro optionally tags your photos with GPS coordinates for survey records.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: SurveySnap Pro saves survey photos to your device.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SurveySnap Pro accesses photos for PDF reports and sharing.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SurveySnap Pro to access your camera to capture survey photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow SurveySnap Pro to use your location to optionally geotag survey photos.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow SurveySnap Pro to access photos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow SurveySnap Pro to save survey photos.
